Class ElContext

java.lang.Object
edu.iu.util.el.ElContext
class ElContext extends Object
Mutable state for evaluating one EL expression.

A context retains the JSON value being evaluated, the root and parent contexts, the unconsumed portion of the expression, and its current result. Child contexts inherit the root value and may provide iteration metadata and a completion action. Completion actions allow nested expressions and template expressions to pass their results back to the evaluation that created them.

Results are HTML escaped by default when evaluation completes. Calling markAsRaw() disables escaping for expressions that explicitly request an unescaped value.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ElContext(ElContext parent, boolean head, jakarta.json.JsonValue index, jakarta.json.JsonValue context, String expression, Consumer<jakarta.json.JsonValue> then)
    Creates a child evaluation context for a value, optionally within an iteration.
    ElContext(ElContext parent, jakarta.json.JsonValue context, String expression, Consumer<jakarta.json.JsonValue> then)
    Creates a child evaluation context.
    ElContext(jakarta.json.JsonValue context, String expression)
    Creates a root evaluation context.

  • Constructor Details

    • ElContext

      ElContext(jakarta.json.JsonValue context, String expression)
      Creates a root evaluation context.
      Parameters:
      context - JSON value used as both the root and current context
      expression - expression to evaluate, or null for no expression

    • ElContext

      ElContext(ElContext parent, jakarta.json.JsonValue context, String expression, Consumer<jakarta.json.JsonValue> then)
      Creates a child evaluation context.
      Parameters:
      parent - parent evaluation context, or null
      context - JSON value used as the child context
      expression - expression to evaluate, or null for no expression
      then - action invoked with the completed result, or null

    • ElContext

      ElContext(ElContext parent, boolean head, jakarta.json.JsonValue index, jakarta.json.JsonValue context, String expression, Consumer<jakarta.json.JsonValue> then)
      Creates a child evaluation context for a value, optionally within an iteration.
      Parameters:
      parent - parent evaluation context, or null for a root context
      head - whether the value is the first iteration item
      index - iteration key or index, or null
      context - JSON value used as the child context
      expression - expression to evaluate, or null for no expression
      then - action invoked with the completed result, or null

  • Method Details

    • isEmpty

      boolean isEmpty()
      Determines whether the expression has any unconsumed characters.
      Returns:
      true when the expression is absent or fully consumed

    • complete

      void complete()
      Completes evaluation of this context.

      The completion action, when present, receives getResult() before default HTML escaping is applied to this context's string result. Escaping is skipped when this context has been marked raw.

    • getPosition

      int getPosition()
      Returns the offset of the next unconsumed expression character.
      Returns:
      current expression offset

    • advancePosition

      void advancePosition(int position)
      Advances the current expression position.
      Parameters:
      position - number of characters to advance

    • trim

      void trim(int n)
      Removes characters beginning at the current expression position.
      Parameters:
      n - number of characters to remove

    • setPositionAtEnd

      void setPositionAtEnd()
      Moves the current position to the end of the expression.

    • isRaw

      boolean isRaw()
      Determines whether default result escaping is disabled.
      Returns:
      true when this context is raw

    • markAsRaw

      void markAsRaw()
      Disables default HTML escaping for this context's result.

    • isIntrospect

      boolean isIntrospect()
      Determines whether template render should introspect properties.
      Returns:
      true if template rendering should introspect properties

    • markAsIntrospect

      void markAsIntrospect()
      Sets template render to introspect each property individually.

    • getExpression

      String getExpression()
      Returns the unconsumed portion of the expression.
      Returns:
      remaining expression, or an empty string when fully consumed or absent

    • getResult

      jakarta.json.JsonValue getResult()
      Returns the effective result of this context.

      Normally this is the current result. After setMatchResult(JsonValue) is called, this method instead reports whether the current result equals the expected match value. A missing result or a null expected value does not match.

      Returns:
      current result, or JsonValue.TRUE or JsonValue.FALSE while evaluating a match

    • setResult

      void setResult(jakarta.json.JsonValue result)
      Sets the current result without changing the current JSON context.
      Parameters:
      result - result to set, or null

    • setMatchResult

      void setMatchResult(jakarta.json.JsonValue matchResult)
      Enables match evaluation using the supplied expected value.
      Parameters:
      matchResult - expected value, or null to represent a missing match operand

    • getParent

      ElContext getParent()
      Returns the parent context.
      Returns:
      parent context, or null for a root context

    • getRoot

      jakarta.json.JsonValue getRoot()
      Returns the root JSON value of the context.
      Returns:
      the root JSON value

    • isHead

      boolean isHead()
      Determines whether this context represents the first item in an iteration.
      Returns:
      true for the first iteration item

    • getIndex

      jakarta.json.JsonValue getIndex()
      Returns the index JSON value of the context.
      Returns:
      iteration key or index, or null

    • getContext

      jakarta.json.JsonValue getContext()
      Returns the JSON value against which this expression is evaluated.
      Returns:
      the JSON value

    • getThis

      jakarta.json.JsonValue getThis()
      Returns the current result without applying match evaluation.
      Returns:
      value initialized from the current context or subsequently supplied to setResult(JsonValue)

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a diagnostic representation showing the current expression position and parent chain.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a string representation of the context
